description: Accounting of the qodesh, ca. 1240. A double leaf, torn into two parts, this document contains a main record of current revenues from rent, but some expenditures and other pecuniary operations are also listed. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 460 #138)
tags: 13th c, qodesh, waqf, heqdesh, account, Coptic numerals
description_he: חשבון קודש, בערך 1240. הכנסות שוטפות משכר דירה והוצאות שונות.
